title: scutellaria albida subsp. perhispida
intro: Scutellaria albida subsp. perhispida is a subspecies of the Skullcap plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria albida subsp. perhispida include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
